title: SortiumCraft
description: SortiumCraft is the classic furniture mod started all the way in 2024-2025. This mod is all about adding functioning and useful furniture and decorations.
body:
✨ Features
Working functionality in most blocks, not just decorative!
Textures of models are based on the current resource pack
A fully working mail system. Send items and blocks to players around your server!


❓ F.A.Q.

I downloaded the newer versions of the mod, but a lot of furniture is missing. I also had versions 1.12.2 and 1.16.5, but I gave up on those and moved to the newer versions. So, this mod is still in development!
